comments.author: Novica Vukobratovic
comments.text: I have matched the filters: Inputs are blue background and same size as the ones on strategy page. On hover, cursor is now a pointer. I saw no issue with clear filters formatting, it must have been fixed in the meantime.

comments.ticket_summary: Add Field to Manage Phone Numbers on Email Conformation Pages in Admin Panel
comments.author: Novica Vukobratovic
comments.text: This can be tested on qa11: Added two new checkboxes to admin/geos/{geo_id}/email-landing-redirects page. One decides whether to show phone number input at all, the other one can toggle that email is mandatory.

mike_mentions.author: Jessica Dordevic
mike_mentions.text: Here are the Proposed designs with the changes. I put different options under each other in the same page. Let me know what you think. Prototype link from Claude 'only for functionality' not design.

mike_mentions.author: Jessica Dordevic
mike_mentions.text: @Mike Pett thanks for the feedback. Yes we did agree to only have the offers when they have a match only. That was an oversight from my part. They're now removed. Placeholders for images were changed on the designs.

mike_mentions.author: Ciara Carroll
mike_mentions.text: the dark blue and gold color combinations do not feel fresh at all. the ombre gradient. there is no need to repeat an icon that is similar to the favicon.
